name: excel-ai-agent
description: AI Agent Add-in for Excel - Control Excel via natural language

scripts.test: node test/unit/test_preflight.js && node test/unit/test_schema_drift.js && node test/unit/test_action_preview.js && node test/unit/test_workbook_graph.js && node test/unit/test_runtime_safety.js && node test/unit/test_dcf_backend.js && node test/unit/test_production_manifest.js
scripts.validate:manifest:prod: npm run manifest:prod && npx office-addin-manifest validate -p dist/manifest.xml
